name: Air Mover Hire
shortDescription: Industrial-grade air movers for fast flood drying
description: High-velocity air movers for drying flood-damaged properties. Our industrial-grade units accelerate evaporation across floors, walls, and cavities, getting your site dry faster and reducing the risk of secondary damage.
features: Suitable for residential and commercial sites
Available in multiple sizes and airflow capacities

name: Dehumidifier Hire
shortDescription: Commercial dehumidifiers to prevent mould growth
description: Commercial-grade dehumidifiers to extract moisture from the air efficiently. Essential for preventing mould growth after water damage events, our units handle everything from small rooms to large commercial spaces.
features: High extraction rates up to 130L per day
Suitable for confined and open spaces

name: Air Scrubber Hire
shortDescription: HEPA-filtered air scrubbers for clean, safe air
description: HEPA-filtered air scrubbers to remove airborne contaminants, mould spores, and odours during restoration work. Our units create negative air pressure to contain affected areas and ensure safe working conditions.
features: Activated carbon filters for odour removal

name: Flood Extraction Equipment Hire
shortDescription: Powerful machines for removing standing water fast
description: Powerful water extraction machines for removing standing water fast. We supply both truck-mount and portable extraction units to handle any scale of water damage, from minor leaks to major flood events.
features: Carpet and hard floor extraction tools

name: Moisture Detection Equipment Hire
shortDescription: Professional tools to assess and verify drying
description: Professional moisture meters and thermal imaging tools to assess water damage extent and verify drying completion. Accurate moisture readings ensure you know exactly where the water is and when the job is done.

name: Water Pump Hire
shortDescription: Submersible and transfer pumps for water removal
description: Submersible and transfer pumps for removing large volumes of water from basements, crawl spaces, and flooded areas. Our pumps handle everything from clean water to debris-laden floodwater.
features: Suitable for clean and dirty water

name: 24/7 Emergency Equipment Hire
shortDescription: Round-the-clock delivery when you need it most
description: Round-the-clock equipment delivery for urgent flood and water damage situations. When disaster strikes, we respond fast with the equipment you need, any time of day or night, anywhere across Sydney.
features: Rapid delivery across all Sydney regions
